arts.ttl: Chelsea v Brentford: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Chelsea v Brentford: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot fires major Liverpool warning that's bad news for Arsenal and Chelsea
arts.sum: Arne Slot believes there's plenty more to come from this Liverpool team despite their stunning start to the season with young players getting better and returning stars

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer masterclass pays off as biggest Guardiola City mistake exposed
arts.sum: "No, Cole Palmer won't be for sale." They were the initial words and thoughts of Chelsea co-sporting director Laurence Stewart when asked just how one of the world's best players was eventually signed for £45million. If Palmer does nothing else at Chelsea he will still have had one of the best individual seasons on Premier League record .

arts.ttl: Liverpool manager Arne Slot makes honest Chelsea title admission as Arsenal watch on
arts.sum: New Chelsea head coach Maresca arrived at Stamford Bridge with much to prove, having landed in west London after a season in the Championship with Leicester City. Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has heaped praise on Premier League title rivals Chelsea .

arts.ttl: Osimhen alternative? Chelsea plot RECORD-BREAKING transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly interested in rivalling Liverpool for the signing of Brighton & Hove Albion forward Joao Pedro in 2025. But, Chelsea have now joined the race to sign the Brighton star, according to TBR Football, as Enzo Maresca continues to search for forward reinforcements.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'best in the Premier League' - Frank
arts.sum: Brentford manager Thomas Frank has said he thinks Chelsea could be the "best team in the Premier League right now" as the sides prepare to face each other in a west London derby this weekend.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca will not “change” questionable decision he has made at Chelsea anytime soon
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has made an incredible start to life at Chelsea but there is one decision fans and pundits continue to question. The Italian coach was brought to Stamford Bridge this summer to replace Mauricio Pochettino and the former Leicester boss currently has the Blues sitting second in the Premier League and top of the […] The post Enzo Maresca will not “change” questionable decision he has made at Chelsea anytime soon appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why Does Chelsea vs. Brentford Kick Off So Late on Sunday?
arts.sum: Chelsea hosts Brentford in the Premier League this weekend, but the late start time might be throwing off both supporters and neutral fans.

arts.ttl: Josh Acheampong: Why Chelsea MUST avoid making Livramento error
arts.sum: In Josh Acheampong, Chelsea have yet another homegrown player capable of becoming an England regular, and they must avoid making past mistakes in order to retain the talented 18-year-old. 13 Chelsea academy graduates have represented the England senior team since the 2016 European Championship, but only Levi Colwill and Reece James remain at Stamford Bridge to this day.
